content.json:
# Certificate Health Dashboard

Monitors certificate expiry and chain validity across Windows servers managed via Azure Arc.

**Sources:** CertStore (My, WebHosting, CA) · IIS HTTPS bindings · RDP · WinRM · SQL Server

> **Server name** is derived from the Azure Arc machine resource ID (`/machines/<hostname>`).

parameters.name: ServerName
parameters.label: Server
parameters.query:
CertHealth_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| extend ServerName = extract(@'(?i)/machines/([^/]+)$', 1, _ResourceId)
| where isnotempty(ServerName)
| summarize by ServerName
| sort by ServerName asc

parameters.name: SourceCategory
parameters.label: Source Type
parameters.query:
CertHealth_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) and isnotempty(Source) and isnotempty(Thumbprint)
| extend SourceCategory = case(
    Source startswith 'CertStore:', 'CertStore',
    Source startswith 'IIS:', 'IIS',
    Source startswith 'SQLServer:', 'SQLServer',
    isnotempty(Source), Source,
    ''
  )
| where isnotempty(SourceCategory)
| summarize by SourceCategory
| sort by SourceCategory asc

parameters.name: Severity
parameters.label: Severity
parameters.query:
CertHealth_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) and isnotempty(Severity) and isnotempty(Thumbprint)
| summarize by Severity
| sort by Severity asc

parameters.name: Thumbprint
parameters.label: Thumbprint
parameters.query:
CertHealth_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) and isnotempty(Thumbprint)
| summarize by Thumbprint
| sort by Thumbprint asc

content.query:
CertHealth_CL
| extend ServerName = extract(@'(?i)/machines/([^/]+)$', 1, _ResourceId)
| extend SourceCategory = case(
    Source startswith 'CertStore:', 'CertStore',
    Source startswith 'IIS:', 'IIS',
    Source startswith 'SQLServer:', 'SQLServer',
    isnotempty(Source), Source, ''
  )
| where isnotempty(Thumbprint) and isnotempty(Source)
| where isempty('{ServerName}') or ServerName in~ (split('{ServerName}', '|'))
| where isempty('{SourceCategory}') or SourceCategory in~ (split('{SourceCategory}', '|'))
| where isempty('{Severity}') or Severity in~ (split('{Severity}', '|'))
| where isempty('{Thumbprint}') or Thumbprint in~ (split('{Thumbprint}', '|'))
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Thumbprint, ServerName, MetricName
| summarize
    Expired     = countif(MetricName == 'CertDaysToExpiry' and toint(Value) < 0),
    Critical    = countif(MetricName == 'CertDaysToExpiry' and toint(Value) >= 0 and toint(Value) <= 30),
    Warning     = countif(MetricName == 'CertDaysToExpiry' and toint(Value) > 30 and toint(Value) <= 60),
    Healthy     = countif(MetricName == 'CertDaysToExpiry' and toint(Value) > 60),
    ChainBroken = countif(MetricName == 'CertChainValid' and toint(Value) == 0),
    ChainValid  = countif(MetricName == 'CertChainValid' and toint(Value) == 1)
| extend Categories = pack_array('Expired', 'Critical (<=30d)', 'Warning (<=60d)', 'Healthy (>60d)', 'Chain Broken', 'Chain Valid'),
         Counts = pack_array(Expired, Critical, Warning, Healthy, ChainBroken, ChainValid)
| mv-expand Category = Categories to typeof(string), Count = Counts to typeof(long)
| project Category, Count

content.json:
## Certificate Inventory

Latest expiry state per certificate per server. Sorted by days remaining (ascending — most urgent first).

content.query:
CertHealth_CL
| extend ServerName = extract(@'(?i)/machines/([^/]+)$', 1, _ResourceId)
| extend SourceCategory = case(
    Source startswith 'CertStore:', 'CertStore',
    Source startswith 'IIS:', 'IIS',
    Source startswith 'SQLServer:', 'SQLServer',
    isnotempty(Source), Source, ''
  )
| where isnotempty(Thumbprint) and MetricName == 'CertDaysToExpiry' and isnotempty(Source)
| where isempty('{ServerName}') or ServerName in~ (split('{ServerName}', '|'))
| where isempty('{SourceCategory}') or SourceCategory in~ (split('{SourceCategory}', '|'))
| where isempty('{Severity}') or Severity in~ (split('{Severity}', '|'))
| where isempty('{Thumbprint}') or Thumbprint in~ (split('{Thumbprint}', '|'))
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Thumbprint, ServerName
| project
    ServerName,
    Source,
    Subject,
    Thumbprint,
    Status,
    Severity,
    DaysToExpiry = toint(Value),
    Message,
    LastSeen = TimeGenerated
| sort by DaysToExpiry asc

content.json:
## Active Issues

Certificates with `Critical` or `Error` severity, plus any broken chain validations.

content.query:
CertHealth_CL
| extend ServerName = extract(@'(?i)/machines/([^/]+)$', 1, _ResourceId)
| extend SourceCategory = case(
    Source startswith 'CertStore:', 'CertStore',
    Source startswith 'IIS:', 'IIS',
    Source startswith 'SQLServer:', 'SQLServer',
    isnotempty(Source), Source, ''
  )
| where isnotempty(Thumbprint) and isnotempty(Source)
| where isempty('{ServerName}') or ServerName in~ (split('{ServerName}', '|'))
| where isempty('{SourceCategory}') or SourceCategory in~ (split('{SourceCategory}', '|'))
| where isempty('{Thumbprint}') or Thumbprint in~ (split('{Thumbprint}', '|'))
| where Severity in ('Critical', 'Error') or (MetricName == 'CertChainValid' and toint(Value) == 0)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Thumbprint, ServerName, MetricName
| project
    ServerName,
    Source,
    MetricName,
    Subject,
    Thumbprint,
    Status,
    Severity,
    Value,
    Message,
    LastSeen = TimeGenerated
| sort by Severity asc, LastSeen desc
